MineralSite.name: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Whabouchi Project in North America dated January 2011.pdf

document.title: NI 43-101 Technical Report for the Whabouchi Project in North America dated January 2011.pdf
document.description: The report is a National Instrument 43-101 compliant Preliminary Economic Assessment (PEA) for the Whabouchi lithium deposit, presenting its economic viability and justifying steps towards a pilot plant and feasibility study.
